name: Cheddar Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Finely diced leeks (white part only)
1 pound Vermont cheddar cheese, finely grated
1 pound New York cheddar cheese, finely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy soup pot.
2. Add the diced celery, leeks (white part only), and carrots; cook, stirring occasionally, over low heat for 3 minutes.
3. Stir in the flour and cook over low heat for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Gradually add the beef broth and light beer. Bring to a simmer very slowly, about 15-20 minutes, until the vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally.
5. Over low heat, gradually stir in the grated cheddar cheeses until smooth.
6. Season with cayenne pepper, black pepper, and salt.
7. Continue cooking over low heat until heated through. Do not boil, or the soup will separate.
